title: Agility Enchantment
description: Adds the "Agility" enchantment which increases step height to make ground travel easier.
body:
# Agility Enchantment

Agility Enchantment adds the "Agility" leggings enchantment which increases the step height and allows to get on higher blocks without jumping when moving forward, like on a horse, to make ground travel easier.

<details>
<summary>GIF example of how Agility works</summary>

![GIF example of how Agility works](https://s10.gifyu.com/images/SfxH7.gif)
</details>



**Agility Enchantment exists in two different versions :**
- The DPO version that requires only a datapack whose enchantment is called “Agility”, whatever your language.
- The WRP version that requires both a datapack and a resource pack whose enchantment name is translated into the player's language, it currently contains 45 different Minecraft languages. Most languages have been translated with an automatic translator, the translations have been double-checked but may still not be optimal. I may add more languages in future versions. If you'd like me to add a new language or modify a current translation to make it more accurate, don't hesitate to message me.
